proposal.hypothesis: After restoring causal parity, a small pose-directed waist moment only inside the dynamic recovery path may enlarge the retry basin without changing static self-righting or locomotion.
proposal.expectedEffect: Improve the remaining degraded dynamic recovery cases while preserving exact Mission, static self-righting, handoff, and command regressions.

candidate.name: Test a two-axis waist and explicit observation-budget trade on the complete resilience Mission
candidate.hypothesis: A bounded roll/pitch waist can improve the disturbed recovery basin and preserve post-recovery command execution when its extra actions are paid for by removing raw action history and retaining only explicit measured delay state.
candidate.expectedEffect: Pass more locked no-reset Mission gates than the rigid baseline while remaining within 6.5 kg, 14 actions, 145 observations, and the existing contact/cost envelope; otherwise retain the simpler rigid torso.

from.name: Resilience quadruped with extended hip travel, motion command, force, IMU, and actuator history

to.name: Two-axis waist resilience candidate with observation-budgeted delay state
